历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 14358 → 14694 → 16726 → 20108 → 13271. The planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 5 → 8 → 7 → 9 → 6, with 6 planned for 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (65th in 2025), with a steady upward trend in recent years and continuously strengthening comprehensive strength. In 2024, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, involving a teacher ethics incident (an associate professor reported for sexual harassment), which may have a certain dampening effect on application psychology. Total Douyin popularity ranking 15th (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable attention. No obvious gaps in admission records. Chinese Language and Literature A-, Psychology A-, Education A-, three A- disciplines, with outstanding strength in teacher-training disciplines, providing stable appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher-training/education majors in 2024 was assessed as 'differentiated wait-and-see,' significantly cooling from 'recommended' (70.76) in 2022. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch was 367 points in 2025, basically stable compared to 368 points in 2024.
